name: ViewExtensionDisplayMode
summary: Possible display modes for an extension UI control.

enum_values.name: DockRight
enum_values.summary: Extension control should be displayed docked to the right side.

enum_values.name: FloatingWindow
enum_values.summary: Extension control should be displayed in a floating window.

enum_values.name: Unspecified
enum_values.summary: Not really a display mode but rather the absence of one.
